[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed mobile screen shows the word “keina” with “12:00” above a circular profile image, surrounded by a repeating outline pattern of cartoon icons.

The main focus is a small circular avatar near the center, containing an anime-style face with light skin, large brown eyes, and long brown hair, with a pink bow and a white cap-like shape covering part of the hair; the head is turned slightly to the left and the figure has a small open-mouth smile.

The setting appears to be a smartphone interface viewed in portrait orientation. The background is a dark blue to near-black field filled with many light outline drawings of various simple cartoon objects and shapes, including stars, hearts, musical notes, planets, bottles, birds, suns, clouds, and other doodle-like symbols. Lighting is flat and graphic, consistent with a UI screen. At the top center, the text sits over the patterned background, and at the bottom there is a dark navigation bar with icons.

Visible text includes “keina” and “12:00” in white near the upper center.

No important visible text detected. The image shows a mobile app or chat-style interface with a patterned background, a name and time label, and a circular avatar. The bottom area contains several small UI icons, including a prominent red button with a white handset icon.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
